name: Rack Equipment Inventory - Image to Excel (Portkey Edition)

parameters.content:
## 🔧 SETUP INSTRUCTIONS

**Credential Required (1):**
- Type: HTTP Header Auth
- Name: **Anthropic-API-Key**
- Header Name: `x-api-key`
- Header Value: `sk-ant-api03-...`

**Node: LLM via Portkey**
- URL: `http://portkey-gateway.iis-ai-ai.svc.cluster.local:8787/v1/chat/completions`
- OR external: `https://llm-gateway.apps.ocp419.crucible.iisl.com/v1/chat/completions`
- Header: `x-portkey-provider: anthropic`
- Header: `x-api-key: sk-ant-api03-...`
- Model: `claude-opus-4-6`

**MCP Server:**
- Internal: `http://sunbird-mcp-server.iis-ai-ai.svc.cluster.local:8080`
- External: `https://sunbird-mcp.apps.ocp419.crucible.iisl.com`

**Test:**
```
curl -X POST https://workflows.apps.ocp419.crucible.iisl.com/webhook/rack-inventory \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"image_url":"https://example.com/rack.jpg","output_format":"json"}'
```

## 📤 OUTPUT OPTIONS

**JSON (default):**
Omit `output_format` or set to `"json"`
Returns structured JSON body

**CSV Download:**
Set `output_format: "csv"`
Returns file attachment
Opens in Excel / Google Sheets

**CSV Summary Block:**
Appended below equipment rows
Contains 9 rack-level metrics
